mapper.sql: id, name, code, value, group_code, description, sort, status, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT value FROM sys_param WHERE code = #{code} AND status = 1 AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM sys_param WHERE code = #{code} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM sys_param WHERE group_code = #{groupCode} AND status = 1 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_param SET value = #{value}, update_time = NOW() WHERE code = #{code} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_param (name, code, value, group_code, description, sort, status, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, deleted) VALUES (#{name}, #{code}, #{value}, #{groupCode}, #{description}, #{sort}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW(), #{createBy}, #{updateBy}, #{deleted})
